title: StudioDash
seoTitle: StudioDash | Developer Analytics Dashboard | BarkinMad Studios
description: StudioDash brings App Store Connect, Cloudflare, advertising, search, and operational metrics together in one native workspace for independent developers and small studios.
keywords: developer dashboard, app analytics, app store analytics, cloudflare analytics, indie developer tools, studio dashboard, business intelligence
heading: StudioDash

hero.alt: StudioDash developer analytics dashboard with revenue, download, traffic and operational metrics

overview: StudioDash is an analytics and business intelligence platform built for independent developers, creators, and small studios.

It combines App Store Connect, Cloudflare, AdMob, AdSense, Google Search Console, GitHub, and other services into a single native workspace, making it easier to monitor downloads, revenue, traffic, application performance, and operational health.
Currently in active development, StudioDash is preparing for a controlled private beta ahead of a wider public release.

sections.heading: Why StudioDash?
paragraphs: Keeping track of an app or game often means switching between multiple dashboards, reports, and services. That makes it difficult to build a complete picture of how a product or business is performing.

StudioDash brings analytics, revenue reporting, service health, website performance, and operational insights together in one native application, helping developers spend less time gathering data and more time acting on it.

sections.heading: Development Status
paragraphs: StudioDash is under active development, with new integrations and features being added regularly.
A limited private beta is planned for independent developers and small studios who want to provide feedback and help shape the product before its public release.

actions.label: Learn About the StudioDash Private Beta
